query: UPDATE secure_documents SET ownerId = 32 WHERE title LIKE '%Operating Agreement%' OR title LIKE '%Trust%' OR title LIKE '%Bylaws%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute UPDATE secure_documents SET ownerId = 32 WHERE title LIKE '%Operating Agreement%' OR title LIKE '%Trust%' OR title LIKE '%Bylaws%'
